Metadata.title: TehnicalDent | Dental Clinic of Excellence
Metadata.description: TehnicalDent dental clinic offers high-quality dental care services, from consultations and preventive treatments to complex implantology and cosmetic dentistry procedures.
Metadata.keywords: dental clinic, dentist, dental implant, cosmetic dentistry, orthodontics, dental treatment

MegaMenu.nuStiiCeTratament: Not sure which treatment you need?

Home.heroDescription: At TechnicalDent, we combine top-tier medical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized dental treatments. Each patient receives individualized attention and a treatment plan tailored to their specific needs, in a comfortable and welcoming environment.
Home.serviciiDescription: We offer a full range of dental services, from prevention and hygiene to complex surgery and implantology procedures. Each treatment is performed with precision and attention to detail.
Home.ctaTitle: Ready to take the first step?
Home.ctaDescription: Schedule a consultation to discuss your needs with one of our specialists and receive a personalized treatment plan. We are here to help you achieve the smile you deserve.

Contact.metaDescription: Contact TehnicalDent dental clinic for appointments, questions or additional information. We are here to help you.
Contact.subtitle: Contact
Contact.heroDescription: Schedule a consultation or contact us for any questions. Our team is at your disposal.
Contact.formularDesc: Fill in the form and we will contact you as soon as possible to confirm the appointment or answer your questions.
Contact.whatsAppDesc: We respond quickly during working hours
Contact.urgenteDesc: For emergencies outside working hours, call us directly.

ContactForm.eroare: An error occurred. Please try again.
ContactForm.vomContacta: We will contact you as soon as possible.

About.metaDescription: Discover the story of TechnicalDent clinic, our philosophy, and the team of specialists dedicated to your smile's health and beauty.
About.heroDescription: A clinic founded on principles of excellence, integrity, and genuine care for every patient.
About.storyTitle: Over 15 years of excellence in dentistry
About.storyP1: TechnicalDent was born in 2008 from the desire to create a space where high-quality dental medicine meets genuine patient care. Our founder laid the foundation for a clinic where every treatment is performed with precision, every patient is heard, and every smile matters.
About.storyP2: Over the years, we have consistently invested in cutting-edge technology and continuous training of our team. We have brought to Chișinău techniques and equipment that were previously available only in Western European clinics.
About.storyP3: Today, TechnicalDent is recognized as one of the leading clinics in Moldova, with thousands of satisfied patients and a reputation built on concrete results and trust-based relationships.
About.valuesDescription: Every decision and every treatment is rooted in the values that define who we are.
About.value1Desc: The best possible treatments, using modern techniques and premium materials. Continuous training is a priority for the entire team.
About.value2Desc: Every patient is unique. We listen carefully, explain the options, and build together the right treatment plan for you.
About.value3Desc: We communicate openly about diagnoses, options, and costs. No surprises — just a relationship based on trust and mutual respect.
About.value4Desc: 3D scanner, dental lasers, endodontic microscopes, and digital prosthetic equipment — we constantly invest in the latest technologies.
About.teamDescription: A team of doctors with vast experience and passion for dentistry. Each brings unique expertise.
About.spaceTitle: An environment designed for your comfort
About.spaceP1: Our clinic was carefully designed to provide a calm and welcoming environment where you feel safe from your first visit.
About.spaceP2: We have cutting-edge technology: 3D scanner for precise diagnostics, dental lasers for minimally invasive treatments, and microscopes for maximum precision procedures.
About.ctaTitle: The first step toward a healthy smile
About.ctaDescription: We are happy to answer your questions and show you the clinic. Schedule a visit and discover the TechnicalDent difference.

Gallery.heroDescription: We invite you to discover our modern space, equipped with cutting-edge technology and designed for your comfort.
Gallery.techDescription: We continuously invest in top medical equipment: 3D scanner for precise diagnostics, dental lasers for minimally invasive treatments, and endodontic microscopes for maximum precision procedures.
Gallery.rezultateDescription: Published with our patients' consent. Each smile is a unique story.
Gallery.ctaDescription: We invite you to visit us to see our space in person and discuss your dental needs with our team.

Services.metaDescription: Discover the full range of dental services offered by TechnicalDent: implantology, orthodontics, cosmetic dentistry, oral surgery, and more.
Services.heroDescription: From prevention and hygiene to implantology and complex surgery — every treatment personalized for you.
Services.ctaTitle: Not sure which treatment is right for you?
Services.ctaDescription: Schedule an evaluation with one of our specialists. We analyze your situation and recommend the most suitable treatment plan.

Blog.metaDescription: Advice and tips from our dental specialists for the health and beauty of your smile.
Blog.heroDescription: Articles and practical advice from our team of specialists, so you can take care of your dental health every day.
Blog.emptyState: No articles in this category yet.
Blog.newsletterDescription: Our team of doctors regularly publishes articles with recommendations for dental care and oral health. Come back for new useful tips.

BlogDetail.ctaDescription: Our team of specialists is ready to answer your questions. Schedule a consultation and talk directly with the doctor.

Footer.brandDescription: Dental clinic dedicated to excellence in dentistry. Personalized treatments, modern technology, lasting results.

AboutPreview.subtitle: About us
AboutPreview.title: A clinic dedicated to the health and beauty of your smile
AboutPreview.p1: TechnicalDent is more than a dental clinic — it's a place where advanced technology meets genuine patient care. With a team of dedicated specialists and cutting-edge equipment, we offer personalized treatments for every need.
AboutPreview.p2: Our team of specialist doctors brings together decades of experience and a shared passion for excellence. From detailed consultations to complex procedures, every step is guided by our commitment to perfect results.

Terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions of use for the website and services of the TehnicalDent dental clinic in Chișinău.
Terms.s1Text: By accessing and using the TehnicalDent website (hereinafter "the Website"), you expressly agree to these terms and conditions of use. If you do not agree with any of these terms, please do not use our website. TehnicalDent reserves the right to modify these terms at any time, with modifications becoming effective immediately upon publication on the website.
Terms.s2Text: TehnicalDent is a dental clinic located at Str. Sarmizegetusa 24/1, Chișinău, Republic of Moldova, offering dental medicine services including, but not limited to: implantology, orthodontics, cosmetic dentistry, oral surgery, prosthetics, endodontics, periodontics, pediatric dentistry, professional cleaning, and teeth whitening. The information presented on the website is for general informational purposes and does not constitute medical advice.
Terms.s3Text: The contact form available on the website allows you to submit an appointment request. Completing the form does not automatically guarantee an appointment. A clinic representative will contact you to confirm the appointment. Appointments are considered confirmed only after phone or message contact with clinic staff. We reserve the right to reschedule consultations based on availability.
Terms.s4Intro: By using our services, the patient agrees to:
Terms.s4L1: Provide correct and complete information regarding their health status, medical history, and ongoing treatments
Terms.s4L2: Attend appointments at the scheduled time or cancel at least 24 hours in advance
Terms.s4L3: Follow the medical instructions received during treatments
Terms.s4L4: Make payment for services according to the communicated rates
Terms.s5Text: All content on the website — texts, images, photographs, logos, graphic and design elements — are the property of TehnicalDent or are used with the agreement of the rights holders. Copying, reproducing, distributing, or using the website content for any commercial purpose without the prior written consent of TehnicalDent is prohibited.
Terms.s6Text: The information presented on the website is informational and does not replace direct medical consultation. TehnicalDent does not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of the information on the website and does not assume responsibility for decisions made solely based on online published information. Treatment results may vary from patient to patient, and photographs presented in the gallery or results section are for indicative purposes.
Terms.s7Text: Dental service prices are indicative and may vary depending on the complexity of the case. The exact cost of treatment will be communicated after the initial consultation and establishment of the treatment plan. The clinic accepts cash and bank transfer payments. Prices may be changed without prior notice on the website, but agreed rates for an ongoing treatment plan remain valid.
Terms.s8Text: The processing of your personal data is carried out in accordance with
Terms.s8TextEnd: , which is an integral part of these Terms and Conditions.
Terms.s9Text: If you have any dissatisfaction related to our services, we encourage you to contact us directly to find an amicable solution.
Terms.s10Text: These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of the Republic of Moldova. Any dispute will be resolved amicably, and if this is not possible, by the competent courts in Chișinău.

Privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy of the TehnicalDent dental clinic. Information about the collection, use, and protection of personal data.
Privacy.s1Text: TehnicalDent, headquartered at Str. Sarmizegetusa 24/1, Chișinău, Republic of Moldova, is committed to protecting the confidentiality of your personal data. This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, store, and protect the personal information you provide through our website and services.
Privacy.s2Intro: In the course of our activity, we may collect the following categories of personal data:
Privacy.s2L1Text: name, surname, phone number, email address
Privacy.s2L2Text: dental medical history, X-rays, treatment plans, information about oral health status
Privacy.s2L3Text: messages sent through the contact form, appointment preferences, requested service
Privacy.s2L4Text: IP address, browser type, device information (automatically collected when visiting the website)
Privacy.s3Intro: Your personal data is collected and processed for the following purposes:
Privacy.s3L1: Scheduling and managing consultations and treatments
Privacy.s3L2: Providing the requested dental medical services
Privacy.s3L3: Communicating with you regarding appointments, treatments, and recommendations
Privacy.s3L4: Improving the quality of our services
Privacy.s3L5: Complying with legal obligations regarding medical documentation
Privacy.s4Text: The processing of your personal data is carried out based on the following legal grounds: your explicit consent (given by completing the contact form or upon presentation at the clinic), execution of a medical services contract, the operator's legal obligations regarding medical documentation, and the operator's legitimate interest in improving services.
Privacy.s5Text: Your personal data is stored in secure systems and is protected by appropriate technical and organizational measures against unauthorized access, loss, or destruction. Medical data is retained in accordance with applicable legislation regarding medical documentation. Data collected through the contact form is stored on secure servers and is accessible only to authorized personnel.
Privacy.s6Text: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties, except in situations required by applicable legislation or when necessary for the provision of medical services (for example, partner dental laboratories for prosthetic work).
Privacy.s7Intro: As a data subject, you have the following rights:
Privacy.s7L1Text: you can request information about the personal data we hold
Privacy.s7L2Text: you can request correction of inaccurate data
Privacy.s7L3Text: you can request deletion of data, subject to legal obligations
Privacy.s7L4Text: you can request limitation of data processing
Privacy.s7L5Text: you can request transfer of data to another controller
Privacy.s7L6Text: you can object to data processing in certain situations
Privacy.s8Text: Our website may use technical cookies necessary for the proper functioning of web pages. We do not use marketing or user behavior tracking cookies.
Privacy.s9Text: For any questions related to personal data protection or to exercise your rights, you can contact us at:
